# Michal Švácha

> Personal homepage and hub for two blogs by Michal Švácha, a software engineer based in Prague.

## Blogs

- [/dev/svachmic](https://dev.svachmic.cz) — Technical blog about software development (Czech)
  - [llms.txt](https://dev.svachmic.cz/llms.txt)
- [blog.svachmic.cz](https://blog.svachmic.cz) — Personal blog about career, gaming, and life (Czech)
  - [llms.txt](https://blog.svachmic.cz/llms.txt)
